mapper.sql: a.id AS "id", a.create_by AS "createBy.id", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_by AS "updateBy.id", a.update_date AS "updateDate", a.remarks AS "remarks", a.del_flag AS "delFlag", a.title AS "title", a.status AS "status", a.target_mode AS "targetMode", a.gen_table_id AS "genTableId", a.form_name AS "formName", a.form_title AS "formTitle", a.module_name AS "moduleName", a.source_type AS "sourceType", a.source_content AS "sourceContent", a.source_mode AS "sourceMode", a.current_version_id AS "currentVersionId", a.version_count AS "versionCount", a.tags_json AS "tagsJson", a.last_applied_at AS "lastAppliedAt"
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM ai_form_design_draft a WHERE a.del_flag = '0' AND a.id = #{id}

SELECT
FROM ai_form_design_draft a
ORDER BY ${page.orderBy}
ORDER BY a.update_date DESC, a.create_date DESC

SELECT
FROM ai_form_design_draft a
ORDER BY ${sqlMap.orderBy}
ORDER BY a.update_date DESC, a.create_date DESC

SELECT
FROM ai_form_design_draft a WHERE a.del_flag = #{DEL_FLAG_NORMAL} ORDER BY a.update_date DESC, a.create_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_form_design_draft( id, create_by, create_date, update_by, update_date, remarks, del_flag, title, status, target_mode, gen_table_id, form_name, form_title, module_name, source_type, source_content, source_mode, current_version_id, version_count, tags_json, last_applied_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{createBy.id}, #{createDate}, #{updateBy.id}, #{updateDate}, #{remarks}, #{delFlag}, #{title}, #{status}, #{targetMode}, #{genTableId}, #{formName}, #{formTitle}, #{moduleName}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceContent}, #{sourceMode}, #{currentVersionId}, #{versionCount}, #{tagsJson}, #{lastAppliedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_form_design_draft SET update_by = #{updateBy.id}, update_date = #{updateDate}, remarks = #{remarks}, title = #{title}, status = #{status}, target_mode = #{targetMode}, gen_table_id = #{genTableId}, form_name = #{formName}, form_title = #{formTitle}, module_name = #{moduleName}, source_type = #{sourceType}, source_content = #{sourceContent}, source_mode = #{sourceMode}, current_version_id = #{currentVersionId}, version_count = #{versionCount}, tags_json = #{tagsJson}, last_applied_at = #{lastAppliedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
